about.title: About Dr. Didaan
about.subtitle: Dedicated to advancing pediatric and general orthopedic excellence with compassionate, patient-centered care.

bio.description: Dr. Reem Salim Didaan is the Director of Pediatric Orthopedic Services at Zefat Hospital, specializing in both pediatric orthopedics and general orthopedics. A graduate of the Faculty of Medicine at the Technion, Israel, she completed her residency in orthopedics at Emek Medical Center in Afula and further honed her expertise through a fellowship in pediatric orthopedics at Hadassah Medical Center in Jerusalem.
bio.description2: Dr. Didaan believes that every patient — whether a child or an adult — deserves thorough, compassionate care and clear communication. Her philosophy centers on involving patients and their families in every step of the treatment process. This collaborative approach, combined with her specialized training, has earned her the trust of countless families throughout the region.

item1.title: Doctor of Medicine (M.D.)
item1.description: Medical degree with a focus on musculoskeletal medicine

philosophy.title: My Philosophy
philosophy.quote: I believe in treating the whole person, not just the condition. Every patient who walks through my door — child or adult — deserves compassion, transparency, and the highest standard of care. My goal is not simply to treat an injury — it's to restore your ability to live the life you love, free from pain and limitations.
philosophy.author: Dr. Reem Salim Didaan

message.title: A Personal Message
message.content: Thank you for considering me for your orthopedic care. I understand that seeking medical treatment — especially for your child — can be daunting, and I want you to know that my team and I are here to support you every step of the way. From your first consultation to your final follow-up, we are committed to making your experience as comfortable and successful as possible.
